flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at South Florida State College fell 27% between 2021 and 2024 (65.6% → 47.6%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at South Florida State College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (9.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at South Florida State College fell 10% between 2017 and 2020 ($8.2k → $7.4k).
